message:
test(fcp-core): pin AuditEvent 14-field shape + skip-when-None + chain-link distinctness (flywheel_connectors-3pz0m)

Bead asks for PolicyDecisionLog JSON+CBOR roundtrip pinning. No type
literally named PolicyDecisionLog exists in fcp-core; the closest
append-only-decision-log analogue is AuditEvent at audit.rs:164 — the
per-zone hash-linked log of capability/policy/secret events with
monotonic seq and prev linkage.

Existing audit_chain_golden_vectors.rs covers chain semantics (genesis,
follows, prev, seq) but does NOT pin the 14-field JSON shape, the 7
skip-when-None Option fields, or per-axis serialization distinctness.

Coverage: 14-field full JSON shape pinned, 8-field minimal genesis
shape with all 7 optional fields omitted (skip-when-None for
trace_context / connector_id / operation / capability_token_jti /
request_object_id / result_object_id / prev), JSON+CBOR full round-trip
preserves decision-critical fields, JSON+CBOR cross-format equality.
is_genesis exhaustive 4-cell truth table (seq=0 ∧ prev=None only),
follows() truth table for chain linkage (correct seq+prev, wrong-prev
rejection, seq-gap rejection, seq-regression rejection, no-prev
rejection). Distinct-axis sentinels for security-critical fields:
event_type, actor, seq, prev (Some-vs-None included), occurred_at.
event_type-as-string scalar pin, zone_id helper, CorrelationId UUID
serialization shape, capability_token_jti UUID round-trip.

16 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-3pz0m cargo test -p
fcp-core --test policy_decision_log_serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
